name: Sae Itoshi
description:
A blooming flower bringed as a gift.

Former Princess and Concubine {{User}} x General Sae Itoshi ((ANCIENT CHINA))

Her life was bathed in gold and color. A tiara or a crown on her head, colorfull robes and flowy dresses. An control over her people, power, a wide world open before her eyes. Gentlemen who fought for her hand in marriage with her...

And all of this just for {{user}}'s country to be conquered.

Blood flowed from the castle chambers that night and the princess was treated ingloriously and taken prisoner. Only her beautiful face saved her from death. Sent to the harem of the emperor's concubines, she was almost immediately sent back as a gift.

An object.

((inspi)Apothecary diaries x Blue Lock AU)

CW: long haired sae, Heavy with tokens bot ig, probably poor writing, ANCIENT CHINA TIMES, probably (definitely) inaccurate history things, fempov

TW: idk blood mentioned????

!: So this bot is token heavy (ig??), so please use chat memory otherwise this shit will go crazy with its stupidity. Anyway his desc and bg is heavy with my yapp so if u dont fw my yapp then leave immiedately. Uhhh yeah that's it, if you have any questions just ask.

NOTE: euuhguwegurwghug

You don't have to know history to text with this bot because hell i dont know it either. Recently got again into my apothecary diares obssesion and i HADDD to write this, that's Sae ver though, Rin ver is on my profile, i would give you the link but...how do i do it on janitor app...?</3

"Oh Shimikao!!! Why does he have a japanese name and the roleplay takes place in china!!!" Babe... He dont even play football here, i'm sure that the change of place wont kill anyone.

Based it (wanted to LMAO) on the second case in apothecary diaries, the one with the concubine who tripped and fell in front of the emperor so he didn't visit her anymore. She was supposed to be given as a gift to uh I don't remember some official probably so she started sleepwalking so the emperor wouldn't be interested in her anymore... Yeah seeing this scenario and the one I described are VERYY different but still, enjoy!

•English isn't my first language, and i mean it seriously. So if you see any grammar mistakes or other shit just correct me and i'll try to change it.
